svg.style: font-family:Lato, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif;font-feature-settings:"liga", "kern", "calt", "lnum";text-rendering:geometricPrecision;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-size:18px;background-color:#ffffff

a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: (changed) Consumption-based vs. territorial CO₂ emissions per

Consumption-based emissions
include those from
fossil fuels and industry
. Land-use change emissions are not included.
Countries above the diagonal line are net importers of CO₂.

Territorial emissions
(tonnes per person; plotted on a logarithmic axis)

Consumption-based emissions
(tonnes per person; plotted on a logarithmic axis)
Data source: Global Carbon Budget (2024) and other sources
